visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a graphic intro featuring large Traditional Chinese text '冰上漫步' over a static background of a snow-covered coniferous forest under a pale, overcast sky. (2) A close-up shot focuses on animal tracks—specifically rabbit footprints—in deep, white snow; a hand with a pointed index finger enters the frame to highlight the trail. (3) Transitioning to a first-person perspective (POV), the camera looks down at black winter boots strapped into large, black snowshoes as they step through thick, powdery snow, leaving deep impressions. (4) The scene shifts to a group of people, including the main male character in a green jacket and others in red and brown winter gear, navigating a densely forested area where every tree branch is heavily weighed down by white snow. (5) A medium close-up features the main male character, who wears glasses, a white winter parka with a fur-lined hood, and a grey beanie, speaking directly into the camera with an animated expression. (6) Returning to the walking POV, the camera shakes significantly as the person slips, showing the snowshoes struggling for grip in the loose snow, accompanied by humorous graphic overlays. (7) The creator demonstrates a specific walking technique, using his hands to point at the 'Wilderness 25' snowshoes while lifting his feet rhythmically to show how to step with the toes first into the snow. (8) A wide, upward-tilted shot captures the tops of snow-caked pine trees against a purple and orange sunset sky, highlighting a small, bright atmospheric phenomenon between the branches. (9) A final close-up shows a cluster of pine needles encased in a thick layer of frost and snow before cutting back to the creator smiling and waving at the camera in a selfie shot.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator (Tim), approximately 5 other tourists in the background throughout various forest shots.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An adult male wearing glasses, a white winter parka with a fur-lined hood, a dark grey beanie, and later seen wearing black snowshoes.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A dense coniferous forest in a winter arctic environment. The ground is covered in deep, white powdery snow. Trees are completely white with heavy frost and snow accumulation. Some shots show a distant orange-pink sunset glow through the trees.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with upbeat, strummed acoustic guitar BGM. A male voice introduces the scene with high energy and clarity. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' SFX signals a transition, followed by the crunching sound of footsteps in deep snow. The speaker describes rabbit tracks with an excited, rising intonation. (3) Continuous, heavy snow crunching dominates as the speaker grunts slightly, indicating physical exertion. (4) Faint laughter and distant chatter from other people are audible in the background mix. (5) A cartoonish 'slip' sound effect occurs as the speaker stumbles, followed by a comedic 'sigh' and high-arousal narration about nearly falling. (6) The BGM continues as a steady rhythmic bed while the speaker provides technical instructions on walking, his voice exhibiting slight breathiness due to the cold air and movement. (7) A 'ding' SFX accompanies a mention of environmental change, and the speaker's tone shifts to a more reflective, lower-pitched narrative style. (8) The video ends with a final surge in music volume and a cheerful, high-valence farewell from the speaker.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Experience -> Technical Tutorial -> Reflection -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To share a first-hand experience of snowshoeing in an arctic forest, while providing lighthearted entertainment and practical tips on the equipment, alongside a brief message about climate change.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video features the creator's personal brand handles and showcases a specific snowshoeing experience/tour likely linked to his travel content. Brands like Wilderness (snowshoes) and Peak Performance (clothing) are clearly visible.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social-media vlog editing with heavy text overlays and SFX to maintain engagement. It blends personal experience with educational elements.
